content: State management 2025 consensus: separate server state (API data) from client state (UI). Zustand v5.0.14 is the dominant client state library (50%+ usage, 3KB, store-based). TanStack Query v5.101.2 handles server state (Supabase queries, caching, invalidation). Jotai works but atom-per-state model is more verbose for this app's store-oriented data (transactions list, company profile). Redux is overkill. Recommendation: Zustand (client/UI state) + TanStack Query (Supabase/API state). React Query's useQuery wraps Supabase calls elegantly.
